title: poa multiradiata
intro: Poa multiradiata, also known as Alpine Brome or Snow Brome, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's medicinal properties are also said to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Alpine Brome is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or cream to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
